programs.title: Air Crash Investigation
programs.desc: Behind the scenes of air accidents in recent years.Each episode will present a reconstruction of the events that led to the tragedy.The stories are supplemented by reports from experts and eyewitnesses.

programs.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation
programs.desc: Another installment of the program about the adventures of daredevils who escaped from the hustle and bustle of civilization to the Alaskan wilderness.There they build their lives on their own terms.They must, among other things,prepare for winter.

programs.title: Air Crash Investigation
programs.desc: Behind the scenes of the accident of Aeroflot flight 821. The Boeing 737-500 was traveling from Moscow to Perm.There were bad weather conditions during the approach to landing.Near the runway, the machine began to climb uncontrollably, which was not noticed by the crew.The controller then ordered us to go to the second lap.During this maneuver, the jet lost lift.All people on board died.Initially, it was suspected that a faulty designed rudder had failed.However, investigators found a number of irregularities.Pilots include:they used forged documents.
